data.name: Administrative write actions will appear here.
data.value: Administrative write actions will appear here.

data.name: Lost your device? Use a recovery code
data.value: Lost your device? Use a recovery code

data.name: Create the first one on the right.
data.value: Create the first one on the right.

data.name: Slug — blank = auto from EN title
data.value: Slug — blank = auto from EN title

data.name: Smart collection — products selected by rules
data.value: Smart collection — products selected by rules

data.name: Save the collection first, then curate products (manual) or define rules (smart).
data.value: Save the collection first, then curate products (manual) or define rules (smart).

data.name: Title, slug, type, vendor or tag…
data.value: Title, slug, type, vendor or tag…

data.name: No matching active products — products already in this collection are hidden.
data.value: No matching active products — products already in this collection are hidden.

data.name: Search above to find active products and add them to this collection.
data.value: Search above to find active products and add them to this collection.

data.name: Rows with an empty value are ignored when saving.
data.value: Rows with an empty value are ignored when saving.

data.name: Create a manual collection and curate products, or a smart collection driven by rules.
data.value: Create a manual collection and curate products, or a smart collection driven by rules.

data.name: Consent preferences recorded with the account, registered
data.value: Consent preferences recorded with the account, registered

data.name: This customer has not added a delivery address yet.
data.value: This customer has not added a delivery address yet.

data.name: Orders placed by this customer will appear here.
data.value: Orders placed by this customer will appear here.

data.name: Try a different name, email, or phone number.
data.value: Try a different name, email, or phone number.

data.name: Value (% for percentage, KWD for fixed amount)
data.value: Value (% for percentage, KWD for fixed amount)

data.name: Adjust the filters, or create the first code.
data.value: Adjust the filters, or create the first code.

data.name: Replying opens your mail client — in-app SMTP sending lands in Phase 1C.
data.value: Replying opens your mail client — in-app SMTP sending lands in Phase 1C.

data.name: No unread contact messages right now.
data.value: No unread contact messages right now.

data.name: Nothing has come through the contact form yet.
data.value: Nothing has come through the contact form yet.

data.name: Please fix the highlighted fields below.
data.value: Please fix the highlighted fields below.

data.name: Leave blank to generate from the English title. Collisions get -2, -3…
data.value: Leave blank to generate from the English title. Collisions get -2, -3…

data.name: When filled, this category is created and assigned instead of the selection.
data.value: When filled, this category is created and assigned instead of the selection.

data.name: Optional — leave empty to keep the current image.
data.value: Optional — leave empty to keep the current image.

data.name: Formatted with the editor; sanitized on save before it renders on the storefront.
data.value: Formatted with the editor; sanitized on save before it renders on the storefront.

data.name: Optional. A future date schedules the post; blank publishes immediately.
data.value: Optional. A future date schedules the post; blank publishes immediately.

data.name: Signups from the storefront newsletter band will appear here.
data.value: Signups from the storefront newsletter band will appear here.

data.name: Create one for an Instagram, WhatsApp, or phone sale.
data.value: Create one for an Instagram, WhatsApp, or phone sale.

data.name: Use the product picker below to add items.
data.value: Use the product picker below to add items.

data.name: Validates items, decrements stock, and places the order as
data.value: Validates items, decrements stock, and places the order as

data.name: Permanently removes this draft and its items.
data.value: Permanently removes this draft and its items.

data.name: Draft orders are built by staff for Instagram, WhatsApp, or phone sales. Provide at least an email address or a phone number.
data.value: Draft orders are built by staff for Instagram, WhatsApp, or phone sales. Provide at least an email address or a phone number.

data.name: Create the first static page — About, Shipping, Returns, Privacy, Terms…
data.value: Create the first static page — About, Shipping, Returns, Privacy, Terms…

data.name: Defining options regenerates the variant matrix
data.value: Defining options regenerates the variant matrix

data.name: Deleting is permanent. Past orders keep their snapshots, but the product disappears from the store. Setting status to
data.value: Deleting is permanent. Past orders keep their snapshots, but the product disappears from the store. Setting status to

data.name: Adjust the filters, or create the first product.
data.value: Adjust the filters, or create the first product.

data.name: Store these codes somewhere safe. Each one signs you in
data.value: Store these codes somewhere safe. Each one signs you in

data.name: if you lose access to your authenticator app. They will not be shown again.
data.value: if you lose access to your authenticator app. They will not be shown again.

data.name: 1 — Add the key to your authenticator app
data.value: 1 — Add the key to your authenticator app

data.name: Enter this shared key manually in your authenticator app:
data.value: Enter this shared key manually in your authenticator app:

data.name: URI into an app that accepts pasted/typed setup URIs (no QR code needed):
data.value: URI into an app that accepts pasted/typed setup URIs (no QR code needed):

data.name: Protect your staff account with time-based one-time passwords. You'll add a shared key to an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, 1Password, ...) and confirm with a 6-digit code.
data.value: Protect your staff account with time-based one-time passwords. You'll add a shared key to an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, 1Password, ...) and confirm with a 6-digit code.

data.name: Two-factor authentication is active. You have
data.value: Two-factor authentication is active. You have

data.name: To rotate the shared key, run setup again — this invalidates the old key and recovery codes.
data.value: To rotate the shared key, run setup again — this invalidates the old key and recovery codes.

data.name: Each panel saves independently. Money values are KWD with 3 decimals.
data.value: Each panel saves independently. Money values are KWD with 3 decimals.

data.name: Two scrolling tickers — the header bar and the strip under the hero. One message per line, per language. Untick to hide a ticker.
data.value: Two scrolling tickers — the header bar and the strip under the hero. One message per line, per language. Untick to hide a ticker.

data.name: Maintenance mode — storefront shows a holding page
data.value: Maintenance mode — storefront shows a holding page

data.name: An unexpected error occurred. The team has been notified — try again, or head back to the dashboard.
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. The team has been notified — try again, or head back to the dashboard.

data.name: You cannot lock your own account.
data.value: You cannot lock your own account.

data.name: Add the first staff member to get started.
data.value: Add the first staff member to get started.
